form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 6th (Fr2) over 1650m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 10 m by The Golden Hook (2:00.30) in NR 50 to 55 on April 1 at $26. Before that 5th (Fr1) over 2150m at this track, beaten 5 m by The Golden Hook (2:35.90) in NR 47 to 51 on March 25 at $15. Can do better from this draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Surrendered the lead to Shazza Love approaching the 1400m mark.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth behind Feel The Reign at this track over 2150m in a NR 50 to 55 on February 20 at $51. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing third after being driven well back, behind Insider Trading at this track over 2150m in a NR up to 50 on April 1 at $9.50. One of the chances.

form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 5 m finishing fourth after showing early speed, behind Roll To The Top at Riverina Paceway over 2270m in a NR up to 48 on March 20 at $6. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Metro Memory at Kilmore over 2180m in a NR 46 to 49 on March 26 at $5.50. Draws to make an impact again.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr7) over 2150m at this track, beaten 45 m by Insider Trading (2:36.70) in NR up to 50 on April 1 at $13. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard while leading during the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished a narrow second behind Happenstbabeachboy at Swan Hill over 1750m NR 45 to 50 last start. Before that was beaten 1.4 metres fourth at this track over 2150m in NR 47 to 51 on March 25. Winning chance.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at Riverina Paceway over 1740m NR up to 52 on March 6. Last start 6th (Fr6) over 1740m after showing early pace at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was leading 0.9 beaten 6 m by Franco Nickelback (2:02.70) in NR up to 53 on March 20 at $11. Consider.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait when placed under pressure inside the final 50m.
Over-raced during the middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Last start just off the speed and boxed on; posted a big 4 m win when quickly away, (Fr1) at Shepparton (2:41.50) beating Sports Narrator in NR up to 55 on March 24 at $34 at the bell was 3rd-4.74. Fitter and expected to be competitive again.
